Title: BYOJoystick Extended
Description:
Updated HOTAS support for VTOL VR. Adds full joystick bindings for the F-5E Tiger III, SU-47M Berkut, and F-16C Viper, plus all aircraft from the original BYOJ mod.

Client-side only — other players do not need this mod installed to play with you in multiplayer.

Fork of BYOJoystick by nebriv and BYOJoystickUpdated by majordillow1.
